description: The Wave Variation (A/B/C) selector only applies to wave types 0-5 (SAW, SQR, PW-SQR, TRI, SINE, NOISE). For SP-SAW (6) and PCM (7), the variation selector should be hidden. For PCM, the wave number selector should be shown in its place (depends on i7-3og.9 for nibblized write support).
title: SN-S OSC: hide Variation selector for SP-SAW and PCM waves, show PCM number editor
